summary: Iteration 33: SEO/GEO + AI Search Ads Builder + AI Shopping Feed Builder + outreach AI-draft keyword steering. All 4 phases verified end-to-end. 13/13 backend pytest cases passing. Admin pages render and integrate correctly; product page emits exactly ONE FAQPage JSON-LD; existing /api/feed/google-shopping.xml still intact.

minor.issue: LLM output is non-deterministic - re-optimizing product 14 sometimes lowered shopping_seo_score from 90 -> 80. has_override stays true. Acceptable but worth documenting (consider keeping the higher of old vs new score on save).

Per-request guardrail is implemented as a SILENT CAP (allowed_now = min(50, remaining_daily, eligible)) instead of a 4xx rejection. Caller cannot tell if their batch was truncated. Constants (50/150) are correct; verified by code inspection. Consider returning 400/207 when payload.ids > 50 so the UI can warn the user.

issues: 2 unrelated background API calls return 422 on first paint (not blocking SEO or rendering, no user impact, but worth tracing - likely an analytics/related-products endpoint with stricter validation).

action_items: (Optional) Make /api/outreach/send return an explicit 400 when payload.ids exceeds SEND_PER_REQUEST_LIMIT instead of silently capping; UI can already show a warning since limit is known.
(Optional) On /api/shopping-feed/optimize save=true, keep max(existing_score, new_score) so an LLM regression cannot lower a previously-optimized product's score.
(Optional) Investigate the 2x 422 background calls on /product/14 - not blocking SEO/UX but pollutes console.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductPage emits exactly 1 FAQPage JSON-LD as required (TrendingQuestions emitSchema=false working).
Sitemap aggregates 35 URLs including 18 product pages (physical + digital) and 10 blog slugs - correct.
Ads Builder returns 4 ad groups with keywords (match_type), headlines, descriptions, sitelinks, callouts, negative_keywords - matches spec.
Shopping Feed audit summary: total_products=18, avg_merchant_readiness=100, avg_shopping_seo=69, gtin_missing=18 - all fields present and accurate.
Existing /api/feed/google-shopping.xml still returns 200 application/xml unchanged - no regression.
Outreach AI-draft incorporates provided keywords (e.g. '10-Nachten Challenge', 'TikTok') in subject/body.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4/4 e2e flows: ProductPage SEO, Leads Bestorming, Ads Builder generate+CSV, Shopping Feed audit+optimize+CSV+XML)

test_credentials: admin / Droomvriendjes2024! via POST /api/admin/login (token must be set in localStorage as admin_token)
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing leads and Supabase products. No test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration33_seo_ads_feed.py covers sitemap, ads-builder generate+export-csv, shopping-feed audit+optimize+export.csv+export.xml, /api/feed/google-shopping.xml (unchanged), outreach ai-draft keyword steering, and code-level guardrails. Note: each pytest run calls the LLM 1x for ads-generate and 1x for feed-optimize (cost-aware). Use existing seed admin token; product id 14 already has an override. CSV/XML downloads on /admin/shopping-feed-builder use blob URLs (page.expect_download works; expect_response doesn't because the fetch happens before the blob is materialised).
rca of the issue: N/A - no critical issues found. Two minor improvements suggested above (outreach silent cap, optimize score regression).
